# Elite Turf Refresh

> Professional artificial turf cleaning, sanitization, and putting green restoration serving the Denver metro area in Colorado.

## Company

Elite Turf Refresh is an owner-operated artificial turf maintenance company based in Parker, Colorado. The company specializes in putting green performance tuning, a service most Denver-area turf companies do not offer. All cleaning products used are pet-safe and child-safe. The company serves over 40 communities across the Denver metro area, from Castle Rock to Broomfield.

Phone: (720) 450-1653
Email: info@eliteturfrefresh.com
Service area: Denver metro, Colorado (Castle Rock to Broomfield, core in Douglas County)
Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-4pm

## Services

- Putting Green Refresh & Performance Tuning: Restores ball roll consistency, redistributes infill, levels surfaces, inspects seams, and tests performance. This is the company's lead differentiator.
- Residential Turf Cleaning & Restoration: Power brushing, debris removal, deep cleaning, fiber lifting, and grooming for residential artificial turf.
- Turf Sanitization & Odor Treatment: Pet-safe antimicrobial application to help reduce bacteria and freshen surfaces. Note: the company does not guarantee odor elimination, as results vary by turf condition.
- Turf Fiber Restoration: De-matting, infill replenishment, cross-brushing, and edge detailing to restore matted or worn turf.

## Service Area

The company serves the following areas in the Denver, Colorado metro region:

Douglas County: Parker, Castle Pines, Castle Rock, Lone Tree, Highlands Ranch, Roxborough, Sedalia, Franktown
Arapahoe County: Centennial, Aurora, Englewood, Cherry Hills Village, Greenwood Village, Littleton
Jefferson County: Lakewood, Golden, Arvada, Westminster, Wheat Ridge, Morrison
Denver: Downtown Denver, South Denver, East Denver, North Denver
North Metro: Broomfield, Thornton, Boulder, Lafayette

## Who It Serves

Homeowners in the Denver metro area who have installed artificial turf, backyard putting greens, or synthetic grass. Particularly relevant for homeowners in Douglas County's affluent communities where putting green installations are common and HOA standards require maintained landscapes.

## Why Someone Might Choose This Company

- Putting green expertise that most Denver turf companies lack
- Owner-operated with hands-on quality at every job
- Colorado-specific knowledge: altitude, UV exposure, freeze-thaw cycles, and dry climate create unique turf challenges
- Honest about limitations (does not guarantee odor elimination)
- Pet-safe and child-safe products
- Free, no-obligation estimates with 24-hour response
